hasAttributes.name: createdOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time when the record was created.

hasAttributes.name: createdBy
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the user who created the record.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time when the record was modified.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedBy
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the user who modified the record.

hasAttributes.name: createdOnBehalfBy
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the delegate user who created the record.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedOnBehalfBy
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the delegate user who modified the record.

hasAttributes.name: overriddenCreatedOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time that the record was migrated.

hasAttributes.name: importSequenceNumber
hasAttributes.description: Sequence number of the import that created this record.

hasAttributes.name: ownerId
hasAttributes.description: Owner Id

hasAttributes.name: ownerIdType
hasAttributes.description: The type of owner, either User or Team.

hasAttributes.name: owningBusinessUnit
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier for the business unit that owns the record

hasAttributes.name: owningUser
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the user that owns the activity.

hasAttributes.name: owningTeam
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier for the team that owns the record.

hasAttributes.name: timeZoneRuleVersionNumber
hasAttributes.description: For internal use only.

hasAttributes.name: UTCConversionTimeZoneCode
hasAttributes.description: Time zone code that was in use when the record was created.

hasAttributes.name: versionNumber
hasAttributes.description: Version Number

hasAttributes.name: knowledgearticleId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier for entity instances

hasAttributes.name: stateCode
hasAttributes.description: Shows whether the article is a draft or is published, archived, or discarded. Draft articles aren't available externally and can be edited. Published articles are available externally, based on applicable permissions, but can't be edited. All metadata changes are reflected in the published version. Archived and discarded articles aren't available externally and can't be edited.

hasAttributes.name: statusCode
hasAttributes.description: Select the article's status.

hasAttributes.name: processId
hasAttributes.description: Contains the id of the process associated with the entity.

hasAttributes.name: stageId
hasAttributes.description: Contains the id of the stage where the entity is located.

hasAttributes.name: traversedPath
hasAttributes.description: A comma separated list of string values representing the unique identifiers of stages in a Business Process Flow Instance in the order that they occur.

hasAttributes.name: exchangeRate
hasAttributes.description: Exchange rate for the currency associated with the KnowledgeArticle with respect to the base currency.

hasAttributes.name: transactionCurrencyId
hasAttributes.description: Exchange rate for the currency associated with the KnowledgeArticle with respect to the base currency.

hasAttributes.name: title
hasAttributes.description: Type a title for the article.

hasAttributes.name: content
hasAttributes.description: Shows the body of the article stored in HTML format.

hasAttributes.name: keyWords
hasAttributes.description: Type keywords to be used for searches in knowledge base articles. Separate keywords by using commas.

hasAttributes.name: publishOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time when the record was published.

hasAttributes.name: expirationDate
hasAttributes.description: Enter an expiration date for the article. Leave this field blank for no expiration date.

hasAttributes.name: parentArticleContentId
hasAttributes.description: Contains the id of the parent article content associated with the entity.

hasAttributes.name: knowledgeArticleViews
hasAttributes.description: Shows the total number of article views.

hasAttributes.name: description
hasAttributes.description: A short overview of the article, primarily used in search results and for search engine optimization.

hasAttributes.name: majorVersionNumber
hasAttributes.description: Shows the major version number of this article's content.

hasAttributes.name: minorVersionNumber
hasAttributes.description: Shows the minor version number of this article's content.

hasAttributes.name: languageLocaleId
hasAttributes.description: Select the language that the article's content is in.

hasAttributes.name: scheduledStatusId
hasAttributes.description: Contains the id of the scheduled status of the entity.

hasAttributes.name: expirationStatusId
hasAttributes.description: Contains the id of the expiration status of the entity.

hasAttributes.name: publishStatusId
hasAttributes.description: Publish Status of the Article.

hasAttributes.name: isPrimary
hasAttributes.description: Select whether the article is the primary article.

hasAttributes.name: readyForReview
hasAttributes.description: Ready For Review

hasAttributes.name: review
hasAttributes.description: Review

hasAttributes.name: updateContent
hasAttributes.description: Update Content

hasAttributes.name: expiredReviewOptions
hasAttributes.description: Expired Review Options

hasAttributes.name: subjectId
hasAttributes.description: Choose the subject of the article to assist with article searches. You can configure subjects under Business Management in the Settings area.

hasAttributes.name: primaryAuthorId
hasAttributes.description: Contains the id of the primary author associated with the article.

hasAttributes.name: isRootArticle
hasAttributes.description: Select whether the article is the root article.

hasAttributes.name: previousArticleContentId
hasAttributes.description: Shows the version that the current article was restored from.

hasAttributes.name: articlePublicNumber
hasAttributes.description: Shows the automatically generated ID exposed to customers, partners, and other external users to reference and look up articles.

hasAttributes.name: isLatestVersion
hasAttributes.description: Shows which version of the knowledge article is the latest version.

hasAttributes.name: rootArticleId
hasAttributes.description: Contains the id of the root article.

hasAttributes.name: knowledgeArticleViewsDate
hasAttributes.description: The date time for Knowledge Article View.

hasAttributes.name: knowledgeArticleViewsState
hasAttributes.description: State of Knowledge Article View.

hasAttributes.name: rating
hasAttributes.description: Information which specifies how helpful the related record was.

hasAttributes.name: ratingDate
hasAttributes.description: The date time for Rating.

hasAttributes.name: ratingState
hasAttributes.description: State of Rating

hasAttributes.name: ratingSum
hasAttributes.description: Total sum of Rating

hasAttributes.name: ratingCount
hasAttributes.description: Rating Count

hasAttributes.name: isInternal
hasAttributes.description: Shows whether this article is only visible internally.

hasAttributes.name: setCategoryAssociations
hasAttributes.description: Shows whether category associations have been set

hasAttributes.name: expirationStateId
hasAttributes.description: Contains the id of the expiration state of the entity.

definitions.description: Organizational knowledge for internal and external use.
